allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "node:"; \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; node --version 2>$null; Write-Output "npm:"; \(Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; Write-Output "gh:"; \(Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; Write-Output "netlify:"; \(Get-Command netlify -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; Write-Output "git:"; \(Get-Command git -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)
